recommendations.title: The Greatest Beer Run Ever
recommendations.overview: Chickie wants to support his friends fighting in Vietnam, so he does something wild—personally bring them American beer. What starts as a well-meaning journey quickly changes Chickie's life and perspective.

recommendations.title: There's Something About Mary
recommendations.overview: For Ted, prom night went about as bad as it’s possible for any night to go. Thirteen years later, he finally gets another chance with his old prom date, only to run up against other suitors including the sleazy detective he hired to find her.

recommendations.title: Osmosis Jones
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Animation, Action, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A white blood cell policeman, with the help of a cold pill, must stop a deadly virus from destroying the human they live in, Frank.

recommendations.title: Dumb and Dumber To
recommendations.overview: 20 years since their first adventure, Lloyd and Harry go on a road trip to find Harry's newly discovered daughter, who was given up for adoption.
